title: Migration Strategies
excerpt: description: Combine Super Slurper and Sippy to migrate objects to R2 with minimal downtime. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. You can use a combination of Super Slurper and Sippy to effectively migrate all objects with minimal downtime. 1. Enable Sippy and start using the R2 bucket in your application.
